meta.siteDescription: Leading construction and contracting company in Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia. Building the future with unmatched quality.

hero.headline: Building the Future with Unmatched Quality
hero.subheadline: Alfarida Company delivers premium construction, infrastructure, and contracting solutions across Saudi Arabia.

about.title: A Legacy of Excellence in Construction
about.body: Since 2005, Alfarida Company has been a cornerstone of development in the Eastern Province. We combine deep local expertise with world-class engineering standards to deliver projects that stand the test of time.

services.title: Comprehensive Construction Services
services.subtitle: From foundation to finishing, we handle every aspect of your project with precision and care.
